name: urshifu-single-strike
flavor_texts: This form of Urshifu is a strong believer in the one-hit KO. Its strategy is to leap in close to foes and land a devastating blow with a hardened fist.
Inhabiting the mountains of a distant region, this Pokémon races across sheer cliffs, training its legs and refining its moves.
text: Urshifu-single-strike is the Wushu Pokémon. It is a fighting and dark-type Pokémon. Abilities: unseen-fist. Base stats — HP: 100, Attack: 130, Defense: 100, Sp. Atk: 63, Sp. Def: 60, Speed: 97. Evolution line: kubfu → urshifu. Lore: This form of Urshifu is a strong believer in the one-hit KO. Its strategy is to leap in close to foes and land a devastating blow with a hardened fist. Inhabiting the mountains of a distant region, this Pokémon races across sheer cliffs, training its legs and refining its moves.
